body_storage_policy: public package source bodies are exercised in place by the organ acceptance command; this manifest binds their provenance and digest relation so old metadata cannot promote the organ by itself
receipt_body_policy: receipts are evidence outputs only and are not counted as imported body substrate
source_open_payload_boundary: non-secret Microcosm package source only; no provider state, credentials, sessions, raw private state, or release authority

modules.source_role: Surfaces the engine-room capsule as a first-class organ with the standard contract (bounded fixture cases, planted negatives, body-free receipts, result_card, CLI). _evaluate_case materialises each fixture's declared file tree into a per-case TemporaryDirectory scratch and calls the REAL capsule evaluate_case (no re-implementation, no baked answers); build_result returns status==pass only when both positives observe clean, both negatives are recomputed to drift carrying their expected status_reason marker, and the expected negative case ids are present.

Public-safe owner-routed generated-projection drift gate. Models each generated artifact as an owner row (artifact patterns, source authorities, a no-write check command); per owner it SHA-256-fingerprints source and artifact files, consults a prior-clean-receipt source-hash skip cache, enforces required-artifact presence and optional fact-authority lineage, then runs the owner's declared no-write check command and marks the owner clean only on a zero return with present artifacts. It is the drift authority, not a semantic content-diff proof, a repairer, or a release authority.
required_anchors: uses prior clean receipts as a bounded skip cache
